Document:
# Tajaran
Tajaran are an [bold][color=#4df]Oxygen breathing[/color][/bold], iron blooded species, with pointed ears and long tails typically resembling domestic cats.
They are [bold]obligate carnivores[/bold], meaning they [bold]must eat meat based food[/bold], and have a hard time digesting plant matter.
Tajaran have a light footfall, meaning [bold]their footsteps are much quieter than other species[/bold].
Tajaran names are compound words, made of their colony or family name, and a given name, [color=yellow]family[/color][color=orange]given[/color]. Separating the parts of a compound name, even in casual conversation, is considered improper and may be rude. Some Tajaran replace their compound name with a nickname, or take names closer to other cultures if they spend a long time with them.
